name: workspace.list
description: List files and directories under /workspace. Use this before reading or editing unknown project paths.

name: workspace.read
description: Read a UTF-8 text file from /workspace with size limits. Use offset/limit for large files.

name: workspace.write
description: Write or append UTF-8 text to a file under /workspace. Parent directories are created automatically.

name: workspace.patch
description: Patch a text file under /workspace by replacing an exact string. Prefer this for targeted edits.

name: workspace.search_files
description: Search file names/paths under /workspace using a substring query and optional glob.

name: workspace.search_text
description: Search text content under /workspace. Uses ripgrep when available.

name: workspace.delete
description: Delete a file or, with recursive=true, a directory under /workspace. Cannot delete /workspace root.

name: browser.status
description: Check whether the sandbox headless browser is available and report browser/debug status.

name: browser.open
description: Open a URL in the sandbox headless browser through the Chrome DevTools endpoint. Requires network mode to allow the target URL.

name: shell.exec
description: Execute a shell command inside /workspace. Disabled by default; enable only for trusted sandboxes.
